name: cambium-mrv
description: Cambium MRV — privacy-preserving field evidence for autonomous agriculture

scripts.db:up: docker start cambium-db 2>/dev/null || docker run -d --name cambium-db -e POSTGRES_USER=cambium -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=cambium -e POSTGRES_DB=cambium -p 5432:5432 -v cambium-db-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data postgres:16-alpine
scripts.db:reset: docker rm -f cambium-db 2>/dev/null; docker volume rm cambium-db-data 2>/dev/null; pnpm db:up
